NAME: UK Biobank — Blood biochemistry & haematology
DESCRIPTION: Serum biochemistry panel (30+ biomarkers: liver function, renal function, lipids, glucose, HbA1c, etc.) and full blood count (haematology: WBC, RBC, platelets, haemoglobin, etc.) released for all ~500k participants.
TITLE: A generalized linear mixed model association tool for biobank-scale data
